channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Stop your mobile backend from melting at 3am
item.description: Cut mobile backend latency 72% with NGINX 1.25.3 and Node 20 — keep-alive timeouts, TLS jitter, and the handshake tail you’re not measuring

item.title: When to skip a vector DB
item.description: Cut vector search latency 75% with FAISS vs pgvector — benchmark p99, RAM, and cost for 1 M vectors in 2026. Learn when Postgres is enough and when to skip the DB.

item.title: 10,000 events/sec: when complexity killed our pipeline
item.description: Cut AWS costs 88% and latency 94% by removing Kafka, Flink, and Redis — the real cost of over-engineering in 2026

item.title: Pick the Right Real-Time Protocol
item.description: Pick WebSocket, SSE or long polling in 60 seconds — latency, cost and ops trade-offs with Node 20, Python 3.11 and Redis 7.2 benchmarks.

item.title: AI skills 2026: what pays $240k vs $110k
item.description: Cut AI salary gap 42% with the right skills — prompt engineering vs fine-tuning ROI data for 2026 salaries. See concrete benchmarks, costs, and artifacts that pay off.

item.title: RAG pipelines: the context gap kills production apps
item.description: Cut RAG hallucinations 87% with a reranker and hybrid search — the context gap most tutorials ignore and the exact steps we used with Redis, Pinecone, and BAAI reranker v1.5.0.

item.title: Queue it or lose it: when message queues help
item.description: rites by ~30% and adds ~5 ms latency on wri with Queue message queues — this when I inherited a billing service that used R.

item.title: Make LLMs hum on a laptop
item.description: Local LLM latency cut from 47s to 5s on a 2021 M1 MacBook — the hidden costs, benchmarks, and version pins most guides omit

item.title: Track what LLM pipelines really miss
item.description: Cut LLM pipeline failures 50% with 42 new metrics — context overflow, cache stampede, token burn. Instrument gpt-4o-2025-05-14, LangChain 0.3.7, Prometheus 2.47 now.

item.title: Senior devs quit big tech over trust
item.description: Senior devs quit big tech without raises when systems fail in production. Learn how to build observability into your stack before the cascade starts — with real numbers, tools, and fixes.

item.title: 10 connection pools? Too few
item.description: Cut connection timeouts 70% by abandoning maxPoolSize=10 — real benchmarks, metrics, and the pool size formula teams miss in 2026

item.title: Negotiate pay in weak currencies
item.description: Close remote offers 86 % faster and cut FX loss 95 % using Stack Overflow 2026 salary bands and Wise Business hedging — exact scripts and templates included

item.title: No CS degree? Bypass the gatekeeping
item.description: Cut time to senior engineer 50% without a CS degree — the only metrics that matter, tools to master, and the systems that got people promoted in 2026.

item.title: Non-traditional stacks shipping today
item.description: Cut API latency 50% with Bun + Elysia in 2026 — the non-traditional stacks real developers shipped with. See cost breakdowns, setup times, and the one mistake I made when I assumed everyone needed Kubernetes.

item.title: Cut Node.js carbon 30% without latency loss
item.description: Cut cloud carbon 30% without slowing APIs — Node.js 20 async refactor, connection pooling, and real benchmark numbers from a 1.2M-user Latin American stack.

item.title: Freelance dev burnout: it wasn’t hours
item.description: Cut freelance developer burnout 40% with stack isolation, notification firewall, and clean-slate environments — real metrics, tools, and exact commands you can use today.

item.title: Self-taught to senior: no degree, no excuses
item.description: Senior in 18 months without a CS degree — real systems, real metrics, and the hiring pipeline that actually rewards impact, not algorithms. Reduce API latency 70%, cut AWS costs 40%, and prove seniority with production ownership.

item.title: Message queues: the hype vs the hard data
item.description: Message queues hype data: owed that 68% had adopted a message queue (. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Why seniors flee big tech
item.description: Exit interviews with 22 engineers reveal why senior talent flees big tech in 2026 — decision fatigue, impact erosion, and context switching costs, not salary.

item.title: Sell higher, not cheaper from abroad
item.description: Negotiate remote pay from lower-cost countries using real 2026 data and a pricing calculator that converts your cost into a defensible rate. Learn how to justify $118/hour without apologizing for your location.
